name: sentry-wms-mobile
_overridesNote: tar pinned to >=7.5.11 to fix GHSA-83g3-92jg-28cx, GHSA-qffp-2rhf-9h96, GHSA-9ppj-qmqm-q256 (path traversal) which surface in prod tree via expo -> @expo/cli -> tar. @xmldom/xmldom pinned to ^0.9.10 to fix GHSA-2v35-w6hq-6mfw (DoS via recursion), GHSA-f6ww-3ggp-fr8h (XML injection via DocumentType serialization), GHSA-x6wf-f3px-wcqx (XML node injection via PI serialization), GHSA-j759-j44w-7fr8 (XML node injection via comment serialization); 0.8.x is EOL at 0.8.10 with no backport, so the fix crosses the 0.8 -> 0.9 boundary. xmldom is reached at build time only (Expo config plugins + plist parsing), not runtime. minimatch pinned to ^5.1.9 (v1.5.1 #61) to fix GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26, GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj, GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 (ReDoS cluster; affected range 5.0.0 - 5.1.7). Staying in the 5.x line avoids the minimatch 5 -> 10 API break that eas-cli's transitive tree still assumes. node-forge pinned to ^1.4.0 (v1.5.1 #61) to fix the GHSA-554w-wpv2-vw27 / GHSA-5gfm-wpxj-wjgq / GHSA-65ch-62r8-g69g / GHSA-2328-f5f3-gj25 / GHSA-q67f-28xg-22rw / GHSA-5m6q-g25r-mvwx / GHSA-ppp5-5v6c-4jwp ASN.1 / signature-forgery / DoS cluster (all affect <=1.3.3). Both dev-tree only (eas-cli transitive), not runtime.
